review_title: ERBuilder is a Great tool that offers more value for the price
description: My experience with ERBuilder was exceptional. From the very beginning, I was impressed with their professional and courteous customer support. They were quick to respond to any questions I had and always went above and beyond to ensure my satisfaction. Not only was their support team top-notch, but their product was also of great quality. As someone who has worked with various data modeling tools in the past, I found ERBuilder to be intuitive and user-friendly. It made the entire process much smoother and more efficient. Overall, I would highly recommend ERBuilder to anyone in need of a reliable and effective data modeling tool. Their exceptional customer service and great product make them a standout organization to work with.
author: Jason M.
pros: I have been using ER Builder for a while now, and it provides all the features and functionality offered by other competitive tools available in the market. However, this tool is available at a much lower price than its counterparts. I am the only user of this tool in my small company, but it has brought Enterprise-Class tools to my doorstep. This has enabled me to implement the same modeling processes that large companies with Enterprise Architecture groups have set up. The tool has proven to be a game-changer for my company as it has allowed me to model our architecture and infrastructure in a more organized and streamlined manner. The implementation of this tool has brought a significant improvement in our company's overall efficiency and productivity. Furthermore, the tool has also provided me with the opportunity to collaborate with other team members on different projects, which has further streamlined the modeling process and saved us a lot of time. Overall, I am extremely satisfied with the tool I am using and would highly recommend it to other small companies looking to improve their modeling processes while staying within their budget.
cons: Would like the Git feature throughout all options. It is normal for source control to be in all editions.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: samson T.
pros: The user interface and the user experience where is easy to navigate easily.
cons: None at this time as I am still exploring the software and still learning.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Fabio V.
pros: It is an inexpensive tool that helps the data engineer to build relational databases. As a freelancer, generating DDL files and HTML documentation for my clients is critical, and ERBuilder allows me to do it perfectly.
cons: Something I miss is a function in other tools that mirrors a table in your diagram. Depending on how your data is structured, having duplicated images of the tables in the data model avoids crossing relationships and makes it clearer to read and understand the database logic.It would also be great to have volumetry calculations for large databases; it is handy.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great Tool for design and Reverse Engineering
description: In new projects, it helped being as a staring point of application design. In existing projects it helped to provide reverse engineering functionality to analyse the existing.
author: Saad H.
pros: Sandbox, Reverse Engineering and Visible scripting.
cons: None of the features in the Professional version has limits compared to my use cases.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: One of the best application development software
description: My overall experience is very good with ErBuilder.
author: Yash P.
pros: I like ErBuilder very much as it provides all the necessary tools which are required for the application development with very nice and easy to use interface. It also provides all the support for the database.
cons: As far as my use i don't seen any defect in this .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Saad E.
pros: Its free version is enough to build a full data dictionary. Easy to use and user-friendly. A useful tool for students, Analysts, product designers even for developers for fast DADI building. The 'Inserts' functionality is an added value.
cons: Graphically shows flew visibility on screen.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: ER Builder solved the requirement of needing to build ERDs without having to purchase overpriced and overpowered tools like Visio and Erwin. I don't need most of the features of either of those software packages and just needed an effective way to develop ERDs for internal communication and database development. This tool fits the bill.
author: Alex S.
pros: Database create scripts are done automatically for both creation and changes Clean interface for describing table relationships Easily reverse engineers an existing databases Multiple different popular database languages to create/change in
cons: The "auto-link" feature on the key relationships was not intuitive to turn on in my opinion, and I would have expected it out of the box to be turned on. My first models were very difficult to read because I couldn't find this feature. Finally talked to support and after a bit of back and forth they understood what I was asking for. I wish I could build FK relationships easily from within the table creation dialogue box
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rob T.
pros: For me this product is much easier to use and has a lot of feature than other products costing twice as much. We are not a large company to cost is important.
cons: Although I work with ERBuilder almost everyday, I have not rally found any cons that would make me second guess my purchase.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ishwin R.
pros: It simplifies data modeling with its drag-and-drop interface for building entity relationships making work very easy and less time taking
cons: I admire it's capacity to challenge users. By presenting occasional obstacles, it encourages problem-solving and fosters a mindset of adaptability.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
